messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0017",
  "title": "《崩坏：星穹铁道》基础数据",
  "page_index": 13,
  "page_range": "13-14"
}

Section text:
《崩坏：星穹铁道》基础数据
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制
在传统回合制中打造出策略深度 以丰富玩法与稳定更新保持活力
2025年《崩坏：星穹铁道》国服收入规模与活跃用户数据表现

AppStore月流水（亿元）
用户兴趣偏好
动漫
2025Q1-Q3用户留存
平均次留：
平均月留：
约48.9%

科技资讯

系统工具
综艺

iOS月活跃用户数（万人）
男生占比：
约67.9%
产品优势解析：游戏在美术、音乐、演出上保持了米哈游一贯的高水准，尤其在角色建模、场景构建和剧情演出上，品质堪称行业标杆。玩法上虽然采用了较为传统的回合制玩法，
但将“行动顺序”和“弱点破解”深度融入了核心战斗机制，使其具有相当的策略深度。同时，游戏成功引入了Roguelite等高耐玩性玩法，极大地丰富了游戏体验。从2023年4
月上线至今，《崩坏：星穹铁道》始终保持了稳定的版本更新节奏。并且无论是在剧情还是新玩法上，都保持的较高的水准。从下方的数据可以看出，其2025年的两大重点版本
（4月3.2版本-走过安眠地的花丛、7月3.4版本-因为太阳将要毁伤）仍取得了十分优异的流水表现。
© 2025 DianDian.All Rights Reserved.
13

message.content:
This section provides 2025 performance data and design analysis for 《崩坏：星穹铁道》(Honkai: Star Rail), enabling retrieval for the following:
- **Topics & Entities:** Game revenue, user activity, retention, demographics, and core gameplay mechanics for Honkai: Star Rail (miHoYo) on iOS/AppStore.
- **Dates & Timelines:** Launch date (April 2023), data reporting periods (Jan–Oct 2025 for revenue, Jan–Sep 2025 for MAU, Q1–Q3 2025 for retention), and 2025 major version releases (April v3.2, July v3.4).
- **Metrics & Figures:** AppStore monthly revenue (亿元), iOS MAU (万人), average next-day retention (~48.9%), average monthly retention (~17.6%), male user ratio (~67.9%), and user interest categories. Includes trend charts for revenue and MAU.
- **Claims & Definitions:** Strategic depth in turn-based combat is defined by “action order” and “weakness break” mechanics; high replayability is attributed to Roguelite integration; consistent update cadence since 2023 sustains vitality; 2025 key versions drove strong financial results.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative trend charts, retention/demographic statistics, and qualitative analysis of production quality and gameplay design, sourced from DianDian Data research.
message.reasoning_content:

2.  **Deconstruct the Section Text for Key Information:**
   - *Title/Topic:* 《崩坏：星穹铁道》基础数据 (Basic Data for Honkai: Star Rail)

   - *Timeframe:* 2025 (specifically Q1-Q3, months Jan-Oct mentioned in charts, versions in Apr & Jul 2025)
   - *Metrics/Data Points:*
     - AppStore monthly revenue (亿元/100M RMB): Chart from Jan to Oct 2025.
     - iOS MAU (万人/10k users): Chart from Jan to Sep 2025.
     - Retention (2025 Q1-Q3): Avg next-day retention ~48.9%, Avg monthly retention ~17.6%.
     - User demographics/interests: Male ratio ~67.9%. Interests: Anime, Web novels, Tech news, Simulation/Assistive tools, System tools, Variety shows.
     - Version performance: 2025 key versions (Apr 3.2 "走过安眠地的花丛", Jul 3.4 "因为太阳将要毁伤") achieved excellent revenue.
   - *Claims/Analysis:*
     - High quality in art, music, performance (character modeling, scene building, story presentation) - industry benchmark.
     - Traditional turn-based combat but with strategic depth via "action order" and "weakness break" mechanics.
     - Incorporates Roguelite gameplay for high replayability.
     - Stable update rhythm since launch (Apr 2023).
     - Maintains high quality in story and new gameplay.
   - *Evidence Types:* Charts/figures (revenue trend, MAU trend), retention metrics, demographic/interest data, qualitative analysis of game design and update history.

3.  **Map to Retrieval-Oriented Summary Structure:**
   I need to frame this as a summary that explicitly lists what questions the section can answer, covering the requested categories: topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types. I will structure it clearly for retrieval purposes.

   *Dates:* Launch: April 2023. Data period: 2025 (Jan-Oct for revenue, Jan-Sep for MAU, Q1-Q3 for retention). Key versions: April 2025 (v3.2), July 2025 (v3.4).
   *Definitions/Concepts:* "行动顺序" (Action Order), "弱点破解" (Weakness Break), Roguelite gameplay, traditional turn-based combat.
   *Procedures:* (None explicitly detailed, but mentions stable update rhythm/version release schedule).
   *Claims:* Game maintains industry-leading quality in art/music/story; turn-based combat has strategic depth due to specific mechanics; Roguelite modes enhance replayability; consistent updates since 2023 maintain vitality; 2025 major versions drove strong revenue.
   *Tables/Figures:* Line/bar charts for AppStore monthly revenue (Jan-Oct 2025) and iOS MAU (Jan-Sep 2025); retention metrics summary; user interest & gender distribution data.
   *Metrics:* AppStore monthly revenue (in 100M RMB), iOS MAU (in 10k), Avg next-day retention (~48.9%), Avg monthly retention (~17.6%), Male user ratio (~67.9%).
   *Evidence Types:* Quantitative data (revenue, MAU, retention, demographics), qualitative analysis (gameplay mechanics, production quality, update consistency), source attribution (DianDian Data research).

response_text:
This section provides 2025 performance data and design analysis for 《崩坏：星穹铁道》(Honkai: Star Rail), enabling retrieval for the following:
- **Topics & Entities:** Game revenue, user activity, retention, demographics, and core gameplay mechanics for Honkai: Star Rail (miHoYo) on iOS/AppStore.
- **Dates & Timelines:** Launch date (April 2023), data reporting periods (Jan–Oct 2025 for revenue, Jan–Sep 2025 for MAU, Q1–Q3 2025 for retention), and 2025 major version releases (April v3.2, July v3.4).
- **Metrics & Figures:** AppStore monthly revenue (亿元), iOS MAU (万人), average next-day retention (~48.9%), average monthly retention (~17.6%), male user ratio (~67.9%), and user interest categories. Includes trend charts for revenue and MAU.
- **Claims & Definitions:** Strategic depth in turn-based combat is defined by “action order” and “weakness break” mechanics; high replayability is attributed to Roguelite integration; consistent update cadence since 2023 sustains vitality; 2025 key versions drove strong financial results.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative trend charts, retention/demographic statistics, and qualitative analysis of production quality and gameplay design, sourced from DianDian Data research.
